name: human_review
description: Record an expense as pending human review instead of auto-saving it. Use this when confidence is low, totals do not reconcile, or a policy blocks the write. Writes the expense with status=needs_review and your reason.

user_id.description: The end-user id this expense belongs to

reason.description: Why this expense needs human review

rung.description: Degradation rung this receipt was processed on

source_receipt_s3.description: S3 URI of the source receipt
